programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts look to get out of their parents' homes and into a place of their own in the Philadelphia suburbs; it's a hot market, and after losing out on six homes, they have a lot to learn about finding their first home, and each other.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After years of bouncing around the country for work, this young couple is looking to put down roots near her family in Fargo, N.D.; she's hoping for some vintage charm at an affordable price, but he's pushing for something brand-new.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple searches for a home big enough for themselves, their two kids, her mom, and his big ego in Atlanta. They need an in-law suite for her mom, and he wants something modern and turnkey, but she prefers a place with more character and projects.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Life After Winning: Our Special Final Episode
programme.desc: David revisits early winners to see how life has changed since their big wins. And with more unseen moments, unforgettable personalities, and 18 seasons of laughs, this final special episode catches up with the dreamers who started it all.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: In the Italian region of Tuscany, a real estate expert helps a husband and wife search for a bargain dream home for their family; with insider knowledge on the local Tuscan culture, the couple discovers hidden gems and Italian traditions.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Italian island of Sicily, a local guide takes a couple on a unique tour of the sizzling local traditions as they explore affordable and dreamy homes.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Spanish coast just south of Barcelona, best friends from Texas look for an affordable dream home near Tarragona; with a local property expert, they tour through all the local culture and traditions the flavorful region has to offer.

programme.sub-title: Big Dreams on a New Pitch in Nottingham
programme.desc: After months of moving across Europe, a family looks to put down roots in Nottingham, England. With a dream job, a new stay-at-home parent, and a child who's spent half his life on the road, they need to find a home that truly fits everyone's needs.

programme.desc: After shedding their restrictive religious past in Utah, a couple's ready to start fresh in Rincón, Puerto Rico. They're hunting for a fantasy home to serve as their personal paradise where they can unleash the passions they've always kept hidden.
